title: whisperx step config
description: Configuration for whisperx.align and whisperx.transcribe_aligned. The plugin selects the validation branch by step_id at runtime; both shapes are documented here.

subtitle_path.description: (whisperx.align only) Optional override path to the .srt to align. Templated. Empty = auto-discover from ctx.steps.* or glob next to the video.

language.description: Override the language code used to load the wav2vec2 alignment model. Empty = auto-detect from ctx.steps.*.language, then from the .srt filename, defaulting to "en". For whisperx.transcribe_aligned, also drives whisper transcription language ('auto' for autodetect).

alignment_model.description: Override the wav2vec2 alignment model name (HuggingFace ID). Empty = WhisperX picks the bundled model for the language.

compute_type.description: (whisperx.transcribe_aligned only) auto | float16 | int8 | float32. 'auto' resolves to float16 on CUDA, int8 on CPU. wav2vec2 alignment precision is fixed by the bundled model wheel; whisperx.align ignores this key.

batch_size.description: (whisperx.transcribe_aligned only) Batch size for whisper transcription. whisperx.align does not use this.

fail_on_no_match.description: (whisperx.align only) Hard-fail if no .srt is found. Default is benign skip with log.

model.description: (whisperx.transcribe_aligned only) faster-whisper model name (e.g. tiny, base, small, medium, large-v3, large-v3-turbo).

skip_if_exists.description: (whisperx.transcribe_aligned only) Skip if a sidecar .srt already exists for this video.
